name: AB Microfinance Bank Nigeria
description: National licensed bank (incorporated in 2008) providing affordable loans to micro‑entrepreneurs in Nigeria, disbursing about 6,000 new loans each month. Shareholders include Access Microfinance Holding AG, KfW, African Development Bank Group, and IFC. Part of the AccessHolding network present across Africa.

## Discover the Right Account tailored for You or Your Business.
### [Savings Account Whether you're saving for a goal or just getting started, we’re here to help you grow — one smart move at a time. ](https://www.ab-mfbnigeria.com/personal/savings) ### [Current Account Manage your money with ease—whether you're running a business, receiving your salary, or paying bills. ](https://www.ab-mfbnigeria.com/personal/current) ### [Fixed Deposit Account Let your money work for you, invest with us and earn high returns on your deposit. ](https://www.ab-mfbnigeria.com/personal/fixed-deposit)
![Mobile banking interface](https://www.ab-mfbnigeria.com/assets/img/dropdown/dropdown1.png) [ Explore myABflex Banking App ](https://www.ab-mfbnigeria.com/personal/mobile)
×
## Loans customized for different Business Owners
### [Micro Loans We offer traders and business owners the opportunity to easily access fast loans for inventory purchases or working capital. ](https://www.ab-mfbnigeria.com/loan/micro) ### [SME Loans This is for business owners who require higher loan amounts for capital intensive projects. ](https://www.ab-mfbnigeria.com/loan/sme) ### [Housing Loans The housing loan is designed to offer financial support to individuals i.e. business owners who want to achieve their home ownership dream. ](https://www.ab-mfbnigeria.com/loan/housing)
![Mobile banking interface](https://www.ab-mfbnigeria.com/assets/img/dropdown/dropdown2.svg)

# ​Empowering Businesses, Creating Sustainable Impacts
From affordable loans that help your business grow, to savings that earn more—our solutions are made to support where you are now and where you want to go next.
![Licensed by Central Bank](https://www.ab-mfbnigeria.com/assets/img/logo/cbn.svg)
![Business person using tablet](https://www.ab-mfbnigeria.com/assets/img/logo/HeroImage.png)
## Shareholders
![AccessHolding](https://www.ab-mfbnigeria.com/assets/img/partners/access.svg) ![ADBG](https://www.ab-mfbnigeria.com/assets/img/partners/partner2.png)
![AccessHolding](https://www.ab-mfbnigeria.com/assets/img/partners/access.svg) ![ADBG](https://www.ab-mfbnigeria.com/assets/img/partners/partner2.png)
![AccessHolding](https://www.ab-mfbnigeria.com/assets/img/partners/access.svg) ![ADBG](https://www.ab-mfbnigeria.com/assets/img/partners/partner2.png)
We are proud to be supported by a group of strong and reputable transnational shareholders who believe in financial inclusion and business empowerment across developing nations.
## Move your business forward
### Access any of our loans designed to help your business
Your business has been growing for a year now, and the possibilities are endless. From reaching your next major milestone to turning your boldest visions into reality, our flexible business loans are designed to help you and your move forward.
![Business person using tablet](https://www.ab-mfbnigeria.com/assets/img/loans/microloans.png)
### Micro Loans
Growing a small business? Our **Micro Loans** are designed to give you the financial boost you need. We offer fast and flexible loans with **low interest rates** and **flexible repayment terms at reducing balance** tailored to your needs.
[ Find out More ](https://www.ab-mfbnigeria.com/loan/micro)
![Business woman on phone](https://www.ab-mfbnigeria.com/assets/img/loans/smeloans.png)
### SME Loans
Looking to expand your business, purchase new assets? Our **SME Loans** are designed for businesses with a proven track record. With competitive interest rates and flexible repayment options on reducing balance, we help you take your business to new heights, quickly and efficiently.
[ Find out More ](https://www.ab-mfbnigeria.com/loan/sme)
![Construction worker](https://www.ab-mfbnigeria.com/assets/img/loans/housingloan.png)
### Housing Loans
Our **Housing Loans** are designed for home improvement and upgrading to a bigger space. With loan amounts designed to suit your needs, we help make home improvement accessible, with low interest rates and flexible repayment plans on reducing banlance to fit your budget.
[ Find out More ](https://www.ab-mfbnigeria.com/loan/housing)
##  Run Your Business Seamlessly on our POS
All the tools you need in one powerful system—designed to simplify operations and support your business growth.
![line](https://www.ab-mfbnigeria.com/assets/img/svg/spaceline.svg) [Find Out More](https://www.ab-mfbnigeria.com/contact-us)
![POS in use](https://www.ab-mfbnigeria.com/assets/img/bg/posimagebackground.png) ![POS Terminal](https://www.ab-mfbnigeria.com/assets/img/bg/pos-terminal-credit.png)
##  Bank Account Designed to Help
You Achieve More​
### Open an Account That Works for You
No stress, no hassle—just simple, secure banking designed around your lifestyle. Whether you're saving, spending, or growing, we have the right account to help you do more with your money.​
[ Savings Account → ](https://www.ab-mfbnigeria.com/personal/savings) [ Current Account → ](https://www.ab-mfbnigeria.com/personal/current) [ Fixed Deposit Account → ](https://www.ab-mfbnigeria.com/personal/fixed-deposit)
[Open An Account](https://www.ab-mfbnigeria.com/personal/mobile) [Find Out More](https://www.ab-mfbnigeria.com/contact-us)
![Mobile banking interface 1](https://www.ab-mfbnigeria.com/assets/img/logo/savings.svg) ![Mobile banking interface 2](https://www.ab-mfbnigeria.com/assets/img/logo/current.svg) ![Mobile banking interface 3](https://www.ab-mfbnigeria.com/assets/img/logo/fixed.svg)
![Mobile banking app interface and debit card](https://www.ab-mfbnigeria.com/assets/img/logo/phonecard.png)
## Get on the
Digital and Cashless side
### Enjoy free and fast transfers
on myABflex app
No stress, no hassle—just simple, secure banking designed for your lifestyle. Whether you are saving, spending, or investing, myABflex is designed for you and your business.
Download the app from your app store
[ ![Get it on Google Play](https://www.ab-mfbnigeria.com/assets/img/svg/playstore.svg) ](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.abmfbnigeria.abmobile.abmobile) [ ![Download on the App Store](https://www.ab-mfbnigeria.com/assets/img/svg/applestore.svg) ](https://apps.apple.com/ng/app/myabflex/id6444530589)
![AB Microfinance Bank Logo](https://www.ab-mfbnigeria.com/assets/img/logo/logofoot.svg)

#### Disclaimer:
Dear customer, kindly note that AB Microfinance Bank Limited ("the Company"), its employees or representatives will never request for a commission or any other personal fees or benefits to process your loan applications or inquiries.
Do not make a loan repayment to any account except official account numbers with the name "AB Microfinance Bank Limited". Kindly disregard any information that is not communicated via our official channels or customer care unit.
The Company shall bear no liability for any losses or consequences from interactions with fraudulent individuals who falsely claim to be representatives of the Company.
